message:
test: fix unused-future warnings in rate-limit tests and add gen_server obligation leak test

1. Rate-limit test fixes (repro_service_rate_limit.rs, service_verification.rs):
   Change `let _ = svc.call(())` to `let _fut = svc.call(())` across all
   rate-limit consumption sites. The `let _` pattern with a Future triggers
   #[must_use] warnings and makes it ambiguous whether the call was actually
   consumed. `let _fut` explicitly binds the future (consuming the token
   from poll_ready) while still dropping it, which is the intended behavior
   for these tests that only care about token consumption.

2. New test: gen_server_leak_test.rs adds a 99-line test verifying that
   gen_server call obligations are properly cleaned up when the caller's
   future is dropped before completion (cancelled call). This exercises
   the obligation leak fix from commit 84351e90.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
